title: rosa × dumetorum f. platyphylla
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. platyphylla, also known as Rosa dumetorum or wild briar, is a type of fragrant, thorny rose shrub native to Europe and Asia. Its medicinal properties include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum f. platyphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Rosa × dumetorum f. platyphylla can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
